identity.visual_metaphor: A high-end art gallery where the UI frames the product.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-[#D4AF37] text-white font-medium hover:bg-[#C5A028] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-[#111111] text-white font-medium hover:bg-[#333333] transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: rounded-full px-8 py-3 border border-[#111111] text-[#111111] hover:bg-[#111111] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: w-full border-b border-[#E5E5E5] bg-transparent py-3 text-[#111111] placeholder:text-[#999999] focus:border-[#111111] focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none

cards.product: group relative block aspect-[3/4] overflow-hidden bg-[#F0F0F0]

login.left_panel: hidden lg:flex w-1/2 bg-[#111111] items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
login.right_panel: w-full lg:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center bg-white p-8
login.image_style: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60

shop.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-y-12 gap-x-8
shop.sidebar: hidden lg:block w-64 sticky top-24 h-fit space-y-8

cart.wrapper: max-w-4xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-12
cart.summary: lg:col-span-1 bg-[#FAFAFA] p-8 h-fit sticky top-24

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the file structure: This is a React (CRA) project, NOT Next.js App Router.
Use 'react-router-dom' for all navigation (BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Link).
Do not create .tsx files. Create .js files as per the project setup.
Implement the 'Split Screen' Login page first as it sets the premium tone.
Ensure the Product Page uses the 'Tabs' component for Description/Reviews.
The 'Cart' page must be minimal: List on the left, Totals on the right.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Add to Cart success, etc.).
For the 'Chat' feature, create a simple floating button or a dedicated minimal page.
IMPORTANT: Keep the layout 'Left Aligned' mostly, but center the Hero text if it looks more editorial.
Use the 'Playfair Display' font for all Headings (h1, h2, h3) to give it that 'Bogue/Fashion' vibe.
Use 'DM Sans' for all UI text, buttons, and paragraphs.
No gradients. Flat colors or subtle textures only.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Do not use transparent background where content scrolls underneath.
